title: Programmatic Performance Marketing Manager (f/m/x)
required_skills: 3+ years experience in display advertising (GDN, Native, Programmatic) including retargeting
Fluency in English and another European language (German, Polish, French, Spanish, or Italian)
bonus_skills: Strong analytical skills and campaign reporting and optimization
Creative flair and experience collaborating with designers or content creators
Hands-on experience with A/B testing and performance analysis
matched_skills: Campaign analytics and reporting (CV skill — partially maps to campaign reporting/optimization)
Fluency in English (C1) and German (B1) — meets language requirement
missing_skills: Hands-on programmatic buying on DV360 (Display & Video 360)
Hands-on experience with The Trade Desk
Ad creative briefing and collaboration with design teams
core_responsibilities: Set up, manage, and optimize display campaigns on DV360, Trade Desk, Taboola, Outbrain, Criteo, and GDN including retargeting
Ideate and brief creative concepts, collaborating with designers to produce ad assets
Conduct A/B tests and analyze results for continuous campaign improvement
Monitor and report on key metrics with actionable optimization recommendations
Stay current with platform updates, trends, and best practices in display advertising
recommended_emphasis: Highlight A/B testing and experimentation experience prominently — this is a bonus requirement candidate meets
Emphasize analytical and data-driven skills (GA4, Power BI, campaign analytics) as adjacent to programmatic reporting
Stress English + German bilingualism — directly satisfies the language must-have
Frame any campaign performance reporting (HSBC, IPC) as evidence of optimization mindset
Note eagerness to learn and grow if applying — the role mentions it as a valued trait
Do NOT overstate programmatic platform experience; the critical gap (DV360/TTD/GDN hands-on) must not be fabricated
